variables.notes: Manually Added. Selected XSGA bucket is Employee benefit expenses + Other Operating Expenses + Stock-based Compensation in SGA, while XRD is separately mapped to R&D Expenses below operating profit. The excerpt contains only total company-level D&A lines with no SG&A/R&D functional split. Because there is no explicit 'in SGA' or 'in R&D' D&A row, conservative treatment is to add nothing separately pending manual review.
